title: Larissa Heavy Rain
lead: Larissa is experiencing heavy rain with a critical Z-Score of -3.06. This event has a score of 10.0/10, indicating extreme conditions.
body:
The city of Larissa is currently under heavy rain, with a relative humidity of 93% and wind speed of 2.8 km/h. 
 The heavy rain is expected to have significant impacts on various sectors. 
 The HDD value of 11.7 GG and CDD value of 0.0 GG indicate the severity of the situation.
conclusion: Monitor the situation closely and take necessary precautions to ensure safety and minimize damage.
